subcodes.first_line: Say: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, and glorification be unto Thee, O my Desired One, and splendor be unto Thee, O my Beloved! I testify to Thy power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا الهی و لک الثناء یا مقصودی و لک البهاء یا محبوبی اشهد بقدرتک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
